title: cirsium eriophorum var. costae
intro: Cirsium eriophorum var. costae, also known as the California thistle, is a variety of thistle plant native to the western coast of North America. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce swelling, and promote kidney function. The health benefits of Cirsium eriophorum var. costae include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
